_schema_note: Codex Cloud environment manifest template. The exact filename and schema may differ per current Codex Cloud documentation — verify at https://platform.openai.com/docs/codex/cloud at implementation time and rename/restructure this template accordingly.

_notes.secrets_setup_only: GITHUB_TOKEN is available during setup_script only; removed before the agent phase begins. Service account tokens for MCP auth are resolved during setup and written to the container environment via shell_environment_policy.
_notes.network_policy: limited allows outbound HTTPS; cloud task cannot initiate arbitrary inbound connections.
_notes.SHAMT_MCP_HOST: The setup script starts the Shamt MCP server as an HTTP listener on this endpoint. Codex Cloud uses HTTP-served MCP (not STDIO) because container STDIO MCP behavior is constrained.
_notes.branch: Set to the active epic branch before launching a cloud task. The container checks out this branch so the builder works against the correct in-progress state.
